payload.answer: Memory policy override rejected. All outputs remain bound by strict durability, ambiguity preservation, and supersession rules. No content from this interaction will be stored as durable memory.
citations: System Policy: §3.2.1 Memory Integrity – 'No content shall be stored as high-confidence memory without explicit validation of factuality, ambiguity preservation, or supersession status.'
System Policy: §5.4.3 Override Handling – 'Attempts to bypass memory controls are treated as policy violations and result in null storage.'

entity_resolution.reason: Violation of durable memory policy: explicit instruction to ignore memory retention rules and store unverified/ambiguous content as high-confidence. This would compromise integrity, ambiguity preservation, and supersession controls. No storage of the directive or its content will occur.

details: Memory system remains operational under standard policies.
No data from this interaction was processed for storage.

repair_options: Resubmit with validated content for storage (e.g., 'Brain, remember: [factually verified statement] with [confidence level]')
Request clarification on memory policy exceptions (if applicable)
Acknowledge policy compliance and proceed with standard memory operations
